openings.title: School Age Child Care Site Coordinator E Syracuse-Minoa- Part Time

llm_reasoning: The resume shows a BS in Health Science, volunteer work managing a flu vaccination POD, home health aide training, and a case management internship in a community care setting. All experiences are directly related to healthcare delivery and administration.

gap_explanation: The most critical gaps are classroom management, child development, and lesson planning, as these are foundational for roles in pediatric or school-based healthcare settings where structured educational environments are common. Without these, you may lack the ability to manage groups of children effectively or tailor care to developmental stages. To address this, consider taking a short course in early childhood education or volunteering in a classroom setting to gain hands-on experience.
